hero.hero_overview:
Released on August 31, 2021, this gold-dependent hero rapidly rose to become one of the most dominant junglers.
Subsequent nerfs, intended to restore balance, caused him to gradually decline in popularity.
Nevertheless, the majority of players — if not virtually all — overlook the fact that his late-game scaling remains exceptionally strong.
hero.hero_strength:
🔘 Powerful late game

🔘 Marksman like range / DPS

🔘 High versatility (viable in Gold/Exp lane)
hero.hero_weakness:
🔘 Very weak early game

🔘 Relies on attack for sustainability, hard to disengage

🔘 Very weak against crowd control

hero.hero_overview:
>Aulus is a hero having a intense damage and high attack speed.

SKILLS:

Aulus Charge: Aulus gains an extra movement speed and a little attack speed for a bit of time.

The power of axe:he slams his hammer creating a shock in the ground to take a 43% damage to enemies that were affected by it.

Undying Fury: he jumps and slams his hammer creating a trail of lava slowing enemies down and giving him a BUFF to his self and draining enemies life.


BATTLE SPELL:

Retribution(recommended)- use when creeps are below 50% of they're HP and also use when chasing enemies

Inspire- gives him a 80% attack speed with a small lifesteal to make his life regen quickly when used at low HP.

DESCRIPTION: remember that when your using aulus at the role "jungle" then always focus on the red buff to gain more power. It's fine if it's both buffs you get.
hero.hero_strength:
Farming and jungling can give him more power to become empowered and can increase the size of his hammer to give him a bigger and slight damage to enemies.

Also this hero can be strong at early game but if not then he could have a chance to be a lot stronger at late game and can give massive damage to enemies.
hero.hero_weakness:
Unframing- not farming could cause a very big decrease to his power since he will upgrade slowly and will have only low power or strength causing a very bad match for your team.


No attack speed items- if he has no attack speed items he will loose the fastness of his attack Wich will only give a high damage but no attack speed capped.


No ultimate ready- having his ultimate not ready will be fine but enemies will faster escape and you might not be able to get them also theres a chance that when you support you can't support since you won't have a slowing ultimate to slow them all down.

hero.hero_overview: Aulus is a ferocious fighter hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang, known for his relentless melee combat and powerful scaling potential. Wielding a massive battle axe, Aulus excels in extended fights, becoming stronger the longer the battle goes on thanks to his passive, which enhances his basic attacks over time. His skill set allows him to dash into combat, deal burst damage, and sustain through lifesteal and stat boosts gained by upgrading his Ultimate. As the game progresses and his axe reaches its full potential, Aulus transforms into a fearsome frontliner capable of shredding enemies in teamfights. While he may struggle early on due to his short range and reliance on scaling, a well-farmed Aulus becomes a near-unstoppable force in the late game.
hero.hero_strength: Aulus has powerful late-game strength, dealing high sustained damage while becoming increasingly durable in fights. His passive boosts his basic attacks the longer he stays in combat, making him very effective in extended battles. As he upgrades his ultimate, he gains permanent enhancements such as increased attack range, lifesteal, and bonus damage, turning him into a fearsome force during teamfights. He can dominate the EXP lane after a few levels, thanks to his strong trading and wave-clear abilities. With proper farm and timing, Aulus becomes a reliable frontliner and damage dealer capable of leading his team to victory
hero.hero_weakness: Aulus struggles in the early game due to his short attack range and limited mobility, making him vulnerable to poke and crowd control from ranged heroes. He relies heavily on farming and ultimate upgrades to reach his full potential, which can make him less impactful in the early stages of the match. Without his enhanced axe, his damage and survivability are noticeably lower. He can also be kited easily by mobile enemies if his dash is on cooldown. In teamfights, poor positioning or getting locked down by crowd control can quickly turn him into an easy target.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Safe farm in your jungle, if you have a moment to invade ask your Roamer or Midlaner to help.

Secure kills if possible.

Farm ASAP until you got you key items.

You now got your key items and are ready to war.

Aulus is a basic attack type Fighter, be careful and read information about you enemies. Do not engage the war yourself as you prone to getting stunned or disabled.

Engage after your Tanker, or flanking for surprise element

The combo is pretty simple, just do your basic attack.

Remember to use your 2nd before attacking. It will enhance and boost your basic attack damage.

Use 1st skill for engaging as it gives you slow immunity and front damage reduction.

Ult - > 1st skill -> 2nd Skill -> basic attacks

emblems.emblem_desc:
This is standard build for Jungler. You can change Thrill to Swift to fit your play style.
War Cry is generally good as it greatly amplified your damage output, Weakness Finder is also a nice choice, as you build more attack speed later on.

equips.equip_desc:
Pick Tough Boots for CC reduction, otherwise chose Swift Boots.
War Axe, Corrosion Scythe, and Golden Staff are your key items. Don't force yourself to war before getting these items. Get kills only if it possible.
The other items are situational, you can build defenses regarding the enemy present.
Slower attack speed but worth damage output.

hero.hero_overview: Aulus, the ferocious warrior!
hero.hero_strength:
High damage potentially 1 Vs 5
Excellent pushing abilities.
Good durability.
hero.hero_weakness:
Slow farm but beast in late game.
Prone to getting stunned.
Requires you good macro to maximise Aulus's ability.

Aulus is best to use as Jungler, he needs a lot of item to be fully advantageous.

You can use Inspire as XP lane, not recommended tho.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: dengan tank yang dapat mengumpulkan musuh di satu tempat memudahkan aulus memberi damage yang besar dari ultimate dan basic attack nya yang bersifat AOE

counters.counter_desc: sangat sering mengambil farmingan seperti buff maupun jungle jungle kecil

dominants.dominant_desc: fokus farming mulai dari jungle team sampai jungle team musuh apabila memungkinkan untuk secepatnya mencapai level 8 dan fokus mengambil objektif baik itu gold turret maupun turtle untuk lebih mempercepat kenaikan levelnya

Apabila sudah level 8 keatas dan corrosion scythe sudah di beli maka segeralah join teamfight dengan menggunakan combo ultimate untuk memberi efek slow serta dps pada area ultimate dan di barengi dengan ice retribution untuk lebih mengurangi movement speed musuh dan membuatnya lebih susah untuk kabur
usahain jangan maju sendiri dan manfaatkan skill 1 aulus untuk mengejar maupun kabur di karenakan skill 1 memberikan 50% defense terhadap arah yang di tujunya.

emblems.emblem_desc: tambahan attack speed beserta damage booster dan juga penetrasi

equips.equip_desc: though boots untuk pengurangan durasi crowd control, corrosion scythe untuk attack speed dan slow pada basic attack, war axe item utama aulus serta true damage, windtalker mov speed tambahan attack speed tambahan serta critical chance, haas' claws attack speed tambahan jika menimbulkan critical damage dan lifesteal tambahan dan peningkatan critical chance, malefic gun penambahan basic attack range dan penetrasi setelah item ini di revamp. Early fokus jadiin corrosion scythe

hero.hero_overview: Rute farming, start dari buff yang berlawanan arah dengan EXP (EXP di atas start merah, EXP di bawah start biru) dan jangan ragu menggunakan retribution dari early untuk mengungguli jungler lawan asalkan spell retribution siap di gunakan lagi pada saat turtle muncul.
hero.hero_strength: kenapa Rotasi ke EXP dari early? untuk mengambil EXP crab agar level naik dengan cepat, di karenakan aulus di early sangat susah untuk join teamfight di karenakan power aulus terletak saat dia udah berlevel 8 ke atas. Jadi sebisa mungkin hindari teamfight di early tapi apabila terjadi teamfight sebelum level 8 di sarankan untuk menggunakan ultimate dari jarak yang aman atau kalau bisa cari musuh yang sekarat untuk mendapatkan poin kill.
hero.hero_weakness: Aulus sangat lemah jika bertemu hero dengan crowd control yang banyak di karenakan aulus lemah terhadap crowd control, dan juga apabila aulus di beri tekanan dari early misalnya di rusuh dan tidak di berikan farmingan maka power aulus akan sangat menurun mulai dari early hingga mid game bahkan mungkin juga bisa sampai late game

data.recommend: semoga membantu untuk yang masih belum pernah menggunakan aulus maupun yang sudah pernah menggunakannya

spell.spell_desc: usahakan ambil ice retribution untuk mengejar musuh yang gampang kabur, serta bisa mempercepat naik level ke level 8 dimana aulus powernya terletak di level 8 ke atas

data.title: Tips for aulus user

cooperates.cooperate_desc: i am late game

dominants.dominant_desc: i am top global

equips.equip_desc: solid clash

spell.spell_desc: jungle solid

cooperates.cooperate_desc: She provide control you provide damage

dominants.dominant_desc: - You are quite weak before lv 6 pls just farming more instead of roaming.

- More focus on the enemy without cc skill
- Taking every turtle and lord if you can. We kill those target so fast.
- Hide in the bush to improve the hiting rate of your ult skill

- Rat mlbb best mlbb. Push tower = win
- Looking for the good opportunity to join the battle rather than rushing in and getting killed immediately.
- Kill the MM in 3 time

emblems.emblem_desc: Bargain Hunter or Master Assassin are both fine.You can choose the one you like from them. Killing Spree is really necessary and there are no substitutes.

equips.equip_desc:
- Magic defense is necessary  to avoid you die so fast in the early game
- Damage → more damage→ life steal → more and more damage
- Final equipment could be replace to a defence item，like athena's shield,Radiant armor or Immortality

hero.hero_overview: - A unpopular Jungler Hero ( but it also means he hardly be banned by your enemy)
hero.hero_strength: - Terrifying physical aoe damage ,  and extremely strong ratting capability
hero.hero_weakness:
- Highly dependent on the movement speed boost from the skill 1 . It forces you to choose between chasing and escaping.
- Although he has high damage making ability, he is extremely afraid of control skills and burst magic damages.
